title: Role activity drivers
description: Schema for shared/role_activity_drivers.csv. Activity drivers generalize role demand into service or product demand, baseline scale factors, linked parent activity, and exogenous series.

role_id.description: Role whose activity is driven by this row.

anchor_value.description: Anchor value in the driver's unit. Linked parent activity rows can use zero until parent allocation is resolved.

growth_curve_id.description: Growth curve identifier when the driver uses an exogenous series or demand projection.

parent_role_id.description: Parent role identifier for linked parent activity drivers. Blank otherwise.

parent_activity_coefficient.description: Coefficient applied to parent activity for linked parent activity drivers. Blank otherwise.

source_role.description: Evidence or modelling source for the driver.
